scene: Fruit of the Spirit vs. works of the flesh
'May I never boast except in the cross'
Every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places
The dividing wall of hostility — demolished
The mystery hidden for ages — Gentiles as co-heirs
'Walk worthy' — unity, gifts, putting off the old self
Walk as children of light — marriage as gospel picture
Full armor of God — stand firm
Jesus ascends into a cloud
Tongues of fire — 3,000 saved at Pentecost
Lame man healed at the Beautiful Gate
Peter and John arrested and imprisoned
Ananias and Sapphira fall dead at the apostles' feet
Seven deacons chosen to serve tables
Stephen stoned — first martyr
Philip on the desert road — Ethiopian eunuch baptized
Saul blinded by light on the Damascus road
Peter's vision — sheet of unclean animals
First called 'Christians' at Antioch
Peter in chains — angel frees him
First missionary journey begins — Paul and Barnabas sail
Crowd tries to worship Paul and Barnabas as gods
Jerusalem Council — circumcision debate settled
Philippian jailer — midnight earthquake
Athens — 'To the Unknown God' altar
Corinth — Paul the tentmaker with Aquila and Priscilla
Ephesus riot — 'Great is Artemis!'
Eutychus falls from a window — Paul raises him
Agabus binds Paul's hands — prophecy of arrest
Paul's defense to the Jerusalem crowd
40 men plot to kill Paul — nephew uncovers it
Paul before Governor Felix
'I appeal to Caesar!' — Paul before Festus
Paul before King Agrippa
Storm and shipwreck on the way to Rome
Paul under house arrest in Rome — preaching freely
'In these last days He has spoken to us by His Son'
Jesus tasted death for everyone
Moses faithful as a servant in God's house — Jesus as Son over the house
A Sabbath rest remains for the people of God
You need milk not solid food
Hope as an anchor for the soul — firm and secure
Priest forever — greater than Abraham and Levi
Earthly tabernacle is a shadow and copy of the heavenly
Without the shedding of blood there is no forgiveness
Christ offered once for all — sit down, work is finished
Faith Hall of Fame — Abel to the prophets
Run with endurance — fix your eyes on Jesus
Jesus suffered outside the gate — go to him there
Christ in a long robe — eyes like fire
Four letters — Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira
Three letters — 'Behold I stand at the door and knock'
Throne room — four living creatures, 24 elders
The slain Lamb takes the scroll — worthy to open it
Four horsemen — white, red, black, pale
144,000 sealed — great multitude no one can number
Golden censer of incense — silence in heaven
Demonic locusts from the abyss
Little scroll — sweet in the mouth, bitter in the stomach
Two witnesses — killed, raised, ascend
Red dragon pursues the woman and her child
Beast from the sea — 666, mark of the beast
The Lamb on Mount Zion — the great harvest
Song of Moses and the Lamb
Seven bowls poured — kings gathered at Armageddon
Harlot Babylon riding the scarlet beast
Babylon falls — merchants weep, smoke rises
Rider on a white horse — sword from His mouth
Satan bound in chains — great white throne judgment
New Jerusalem descends — no more tears, no more death
River of life — tree of life — 'Come, Lord Jesus'
Baptism — Spirit descends like a dove
Temptation in the desert — 'It is written' three times
Blessed are the poor in spirit — salt and light
The Lord's Prayer — treasures in heaven
Build on the rock — two gates, two trees, two builders
'I have not found such faith in Israel'
'The harvest is plentiful but workers are few'
'I came not to bring peace but a sword' — mission discourse
'Come to me… my yoke is easy, my burden is light'
No sign given except the sign of Jonah
Sower, wheat and tares, mustard seed — seven parables
Peter walks on water — then sinks
Canaanite woman — 'even dogs eat the crumbs'
'You are Peter… I will give you the keys of the kingdom'
Transfiguration — voice from the cloud: 'Listen to Him'
'Unless you become like a child' — community discourse
Camel through the eye of a needle — rich young ruler
'The last shall be first' — workers in the vineyard
Triumphal entry — temple cleansed, fig tree cursed
Wedding banquet parable — 'Many called, few chosen'
Seven woes to the Pharisees — 'Blind guides!'
Olivet Discourse — signs of the end
Ten virgins — five with oil, five without
Woman breaks alabaster jar — Last Supper, Gethsemane
Curtain torn — darkness, earthquake, 'Son of God!'
Great Commission on the mountain — 'Go therefore'
Mary's Magnificat + Zechariah's Benedictus
Birth in a manger — shepherds and angels
Baptism + Luke's genealogy traced back to Adam
Jesus reads Isaiah in Nazareth — 'Today this is fulfilled'
Peter's miraculous catch — 'I am a sinful man'
Sermon on the Plain — Beatitudes and woes
Sinful woman washes feet with tears and hair
Lamp on a stand — don't hide the light
Transfiguration — Jesus' face changed; 'set his face toward Jerusalem'
Mary sits at Jesus' feet — Martha bustles around
'Ask, seek, knock' — friend at midnight
Rich fool builds bigger barns
Parable of the barren fig tree — one more year
Great Banquet — 'Come, for everything is ready'
Lost sheep, lost coin, lost son — three parables of lostness
Rich man and Lazarus — great chasm fixed
Ten lepers healed — only one returns
Persistent widow — Pharisee and tax collector
Zacchaeus climbs a sycamore tree
Cornerstone rejected
Widow's mite — signs of the end
Last Supper — 'This cup is the new covenant in my blood'
'Today you will be with me in Paradise' — thief on the cross
Emmaus road — 'Did not our hearts burn within us?'
'The message of the cross is foolishness to those perishing'
'The Spirit searches all things — even the depths of God'
Each builder's work tested by fire — gold or straw
'We are fools for Christ' — apostles as spectacle
A little yeast leavens the whole lump
'Your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit'
Marriage, divorce, and singleness
Food sacrificed to idols — knowledge puffs up
'Run in such a way as to win the prize'
The rock that followed them was Christ
Lord's Supper abused — 'examine yourselves'
One body, many members
'If I have not love I am nothing' — love never fails
Tongues and prophecy — 'all things decently and in order'
Resurrection body like a seed — 'O death, where is your sting?'
'A great door of effective work has opened'
'He is the image of the invisible God — firstborn over all creation'
Old rituals are shadows — the substance belongs to Christ
'Set your minds on things above' — put off the old self
'Let your speech always be gracious, seasoned with salt'
Hear the word and do it — don't be like a man who forgets his face in a mirror
Man with gold rings welcomed — poor man told to sit on the floor
The tongue — a small fire that sets a great forest ablaze
'You are a mist that appears for a little while then vanishes'
Be patient like the farmer waiting for the early and late rains
Faith more precious than gold refined by fire
Jesus the living cornerstone — you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood
Eight people saved through water — baptism now saves you
'Do not be surprised at the fiery trial'
'Your adversary the devil prowls like a roaring lion'
Baptism → temptation → calling → healing — all in one chapter
Four friends tear through a roof to lower the paralyzed man
Jesus' family thinks He is out of His mind
Jesus asleep in the boat — 'Peace, be still!'
Legion cast into pigs — man clothed and in his right mind
John the Baptist's head brought on a plate
Jesus puts fingers in the deaf man's ears — 'Ephphatha'
Blind man healed in two stages — then Peter sees who Jesus is
Transfiguration — cloud overshadows
Blind Bartimaeus throws off his cloak and runs to Jesus
Fig tree cursed — all leaves, no fruit; temple cleansed
Coin of Caesar — 'Render to Caesar… render to God'
Olivet Discourse — 'Watch! You do not know when'
Woman breaks alabaster jar — Last Supper, Gethsemane, Peter denies
Crucifixion — curtain torn; centurion: 'Truly this was the Son of God'
Stone rolled away — 'He is risen, He is not here'
'The God of all comfort — comforts us in all our affliction'
'We are the aroma of Christ — fragrance of life or death'
Moses' veil — we with unveiled face behold His glory
Treasure in jars of clay — struck down but not destroyed
Earthly tent destroyed — we have a building from God
'We are the temple of the living God'
Titus brings good news — Paul's tears of joy over Corinth
'The grace of our Lord Jesus — though He was rich, became poor'
'Whoever sows sparingly reaps sparingly — God loves a cheerful giver'
'Our weapons are not of the flesh — we demolish arguments'
Paul becomes a 'fool' to list his sufferings
'A thorn in the flesh — my grace is sufficient for you'
'Examine yourselves to see whether you are in the faith'
'I was a blasphemer, persecutor, violent man — but I received mercy'
'I desire men to pray lifting holy hands'
'If a man cannot manage his own household how can he care for God's church?'
'Train yourself for godliness'
The widow's list — qualifications for enrollment
'Love of money is a root of all kinds of evil'
'Fan into flame the gift of God' — guard the good deposit
Soldier, athlete, farmer — suffer hardship with Christ
'All Scripture is breathed out by God' — sacred writings
'I have fought the good fight… the crown of righteousness awaits me'
'If we say we have fellowship with Him but walk in darkness we lie'
'Do not love the world — the world is passing away'
'Whoever hates his brother is a murderer' — Cain as warning
'We love because He first loved us'
'This is He who came by water and blood — Jesus Christ'
'Cretans are always liars, evil beasts, lazy gluttons' — appoint elders anyway
'Adorn the doctrine of God our Savior in everything'
'He saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewing of the Holy Spirit'
'If he has wronged you or owes you anything — charge that to my account' (v.18)
Add to faith: virtue → knowledge → self-control → steadfastness → godliness → love
'The dog returns to its vomit — the sow to the mud' — false teachers
'The Day of the Lord will come like a thief — the heavens will pass away with a roar'
'Certain people have crept in unnoticed — who long ago were designated for condemnation' (v.4)
'Do not receive him into your house or give him any greeting' (v.10) — the false teacher at the door
'Diotrephes who likes to put himself first does not acknowledge our authority' (v.9)
'Our gospel came to you not in word only but in power — you became an example to all Macedonia'
'We were gentle among you like a nursing mother caring for her children'
'You are our glory and joy — our crown' — Timothy's good report
'The Lord will descend with a trumpet call — the dead in Christ rise first'
'The Day of the Lord comes like a thief in the night — but you are children of light'
'The Lord Jesus revealed from heaven in flaming fire — taking vengeance on those who do not know God'
'The one who restrains will be taken out of the way — then the lawless one will be revealed'
'If anyone is not willing to work let him not eat' — Paul worked for his own bread
